parameters.content:
## GTMfund Jobs Scraper v1

Scrapes jobs.gtmfund.com using Browserless to extract serverInitialData from Consider platform.

**Schedule:** Every 6 hours

**Requires:** BROWSERLESS_TOKEN in Airtable Config

**Filters:**
- CX leadership roles (support/success + manager/director/lead)

**Pipeline:** Job Evaluation Pipeline v6.1

**Note:** GTMfund focuses on GTM roles - limited CX matches expected
